title: Tracked 404 Emergency Diagnosis — Day 5 (Phase 13C.6)
verdict: NO REAL 404 ERRORS — All 12 are either intentional removals (Phase 2 cleanup) or tracking bugs (wrong slugs in tracker). ZERO pages need restoration.

urls.source: Phase 2 V2: 591 geo pages noindexed and later removed
urls.has_gsc_impressions: WAS tracked (3 geo pages had impressions pre-cleanup)
urls.has_internal_links: NO — removed from all link data
urls.classification: E — INTENTIONAL REMOVAL (Phase 2 V2 geo prune)
urls.action: REMOVE FROM TRACKING. Do not restore. Do not redirect.
urls.detail: Geo calculator pages (city-specific variants like /loan-calculator/nashville-tn) were pruned in Phase 2 V2 cleanup because they contained no local data. Only 3 of 591 were kept temporarily for GSC impressions; those are now gone.
Same as nashville-tn — part of 591 geo pages removed.

urls.has_gsc_impressions: WAS tracked (had impressions in early GSC data)
urls.detail: Philadelphia tax calculator variant — removed with all other geo pages.

urls.has_gsc_impressions: WAS tracked (2 scenarios kept temporarily for impressions)
urls.classification: E — INTENTIONAL REMOVAL (Phase 2 V2 scenario prune)
urls.action: REMOVE FROM TRACKING. Do not restore. Do not redirect.
urls.detail: This was one of 2 scenario pages kept indexable temporarily due to GSC impressions. It has since been removed. The ONLY remaining scenario page is /scenario/retirement-planning-5c0e8e25 (still live, index,follow).

urls.source: TRACKING BUG — This slug was never in posts.ts
urls.should_exist: NO — This page never existed as a blog post.
urls.classification: C — TRACKING BUG (wrong slug in tracker)
urls.action: REMOVE FROM TRACKING. Correct pages that DO exist: /guides/how-to-use-compound-interest (guide) and /calculators/compound-interest (calculator).
urls.detail: This slug appears to be a conflation of '/compare/best-compound-interest-calculator' (comparison page) and '/guides/how-to-use-compound-interest' (guide). The blog post with this exact slug was never created in posts.ts.

urls.source: TRACKING BUG — This is a DECISION page, not a blog post
urls.in_sitemap: NO (as blog; but EXISTS in sitemap as /decision/how-much-emergency-fund-do-i-need)
urls.has_gsc_impressions: UNKNOWN — decision page may have impressions
urls.has_internal_links: NO (as blog; YES as decision page)
urls.classification: C — TRACKING BUG (decision page tracked under wrong route prefix)
urls.action: REMOVE /blog/ URL FROM TRACKING. The correct URL is /decision/how-much-emergency-fund-do-i-need (HTTP 200, index,follow, in sitemap).
urls.detail: Emergency fund is one of the 15 decision pages created in Phase 6-10. It lives at /decision/how-much-emergency-fund-do-i-need, not /blog/. This was tracked under the wrong route prefix.

urls.source: TRACKING BUG — actual slug is longer
urls.in_sitemap: YES — but the actual post uses full slug: mortgage-rates-today-may-18-2026-will-they-rise-or-fall-this-week-how-to-prepare
urls.has_gsc_impressions: YES — but for the full slug version
urls.has_internal_links: NO (for short slug; YES for full slug)
urls.should_exist: YES — but at full slug, not the short version
urls.classification: C — TRACKING BUG (slug truncated in tracker)
urls.action: UPDATE TRACKING to use full slug: /blog/mortgage-rates-today-may-18-2026-will-they-rise-or-fall-this-week-how-to-prepare
urls.detail: The blog post exists at the full 104-char slug: 'mortgage-rates-today-may-18-2026-will-they-rise-or-fall-this-week-how-to-prepare'. It's in sitemap and has GSC impressions. The tracker was using a truncated version.

urls.source: TRACKING BUG — used 'retirement-income-calculator' instead of calculator slug 'retirement-planning'
urls.classification: C — TRACKING BUG (used full calculator name instead of calculator slug)
urls.action: FIX SLUG in tracking to: /guides/how-to-use-retirement-planning. CORRECT page exists: HTTP 200, index,follow.
urls.detail: Guide slugs use the formula 'how-to-use-{calculatorSlug}'. The calculator slug is 'retirement-planning', not 'retirement-income-calculator'. The guide DOES exist at /guides/how-to-use-retirement-planning.

urls.action: FIX SLUG in tracking to: /guides/how-to-use-mortgage-affordability. CORRECT page: HTTP 200.
urls.detail: Calculator slug is 'mortgage-affordability'. Guide slug should be 'how-to-use-mortgage-affordability', not 'how-to-use-mortgage-affordability-calculator'.

urls.action: FIX SLUG in tracking to: /guides/how-to-use-compound-interest. CORRECT page: HTTP 200.
urls.detail: Guide slug format: 'how-to-use-{calculatorSlug}'. Calculator slug is 'compound-interest'.

urls.action: FIX SLUG in tracking to: /guides/how-to-use-debt-payoff. CORRECT page: HTTP 200.

urls.has_gsc_impressions: YES — policy pages sometimes appear in SERPs
urls.should_exist: YES — but should NOT be tracked for SEO
urls.classification: C — TRACKING BUG (policy page should not be in SEO tracking)
urls.action: REMOVE FROM TRACKING. Cookies page functions correctly as noindex,nofollow. It should never have been in the growth tracker.
urls.detail: Legal/policy pages (cookies, privacy, terms) should be noindexed. Including them in GSC impression tracking creates noise. They serve a legal/UX purpose, not SEO.

actions_required: Fix 4 guide slugs in tracking: remove '-calculator' suffix
Fix 2 blog slugs in tracking: use correct full slugs
Move 'emergency fund' from /blog/ to /decision/ in tracking
Remove 3 geo page entries from tracking
Verify the CORRECTED pages are live (confirmed: HTTP 200 for all)
